src/main/java/stec/App.java.general_idea: Refactored the main method to use a BacktrackingSudokuSolver instance passed to the SudokuBoard constructor instead of filling the board directly.
src/main/java/stec/App.java.human_impl: SudokuSolver solver = new BacktrackingSudokuSolver(); SudokuBoard board = new SudokuBoard(solver);

src/main/java/stec/App.java.general_idea: Changed the board interaction from fillBoard() to solveGame() to align with the new solver-based architecture.
Added a missing period to the Javadoc comment for the App class.

src/main/java/stec/SudokuBoard.java.general_idea: Removed imports for Random, ArrayList, and List that are no longer used after refactoring.
Added a field to hold a reference to the SudokuSolver strategy.
Changed constructor to accept a SudokuSolver dependency instead of initializing board only.
Added a method to delegate the solving process to the injected solver.
Removed the internal backtracking solver logic (fillBoard, solve, generateRandomNumbers) as it was moved to a separate class.
Added getter and setter methods for board cells to allow the external solver to read and write values.
src/main/java/stec/SudokuBoard.java.human_impl:
public int getNum(int row, int col) { return board[row][col]; }
public void setNum(int row, int col, int val) { board[row][col] = val; }

src/main/java/stec/SudokuBoard.java.general_idea: Changed validation methods from private to public to allow the external solver to check validity.
src/main/java/stec/SudokuBoard.java.human_impl:

+    public boolean isValid(int row, int col, int num) {

src/main/java/stec/SudokuBoard.java.general_idea: Added braces to if-statements for better code style and safety.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JUnit Jupiter engine to a newer version compatible with the new JDK.
Remove explicit JUnit Jupiter API dependency, likely relying on transitive dependencies or engine inclusion.
Explicitly define the Maven compiler plugin version to ensure compatibility with Java 21.
Upgrade Maven Surefire plugin to a version that supports Java 21 test execution.
Add Maven Site plugin to enable project site generation.
Integrate Checkstyle plugin for code quality enforcement during the build.
Integrate JaCoCo plugin for code coverage measurement and enforcement.
Configure the Maven reporting section to generate documentation and quality reports.
Add developer metadata to the POM for project identification.
Add a description field to the POM to identify the project context.
